case_title: CALIXTO ROBLES VS. LAKESIDE INVESTMENT COMPANY LLC

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LAKESIDE INVESTMENT COMPANY LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBLES, CALIXTO AS TO DEFENDANT LAKESIDE INVESTMENT COMPANY LLC
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ROBLES, CALIXTO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-03-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBLES, CALIXTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAKESIDE INVESTMENT COMPANY LLC $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $495.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-10-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAKESIDE INVESTMENT COMPANY LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-03-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-03-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF CALIXTO ROBLES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAKESIDE INVESTMENT COMPANY LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.00 FILED BY ROBLES, CALIXTO AS TO DEFENDANT LAKESIDE INVESTMENT COMPANY LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
